activities.name: Great bushwalk with Mark
activities.description: Great conversations, and sushi! Thank you Mark

activities.name: Sydney’s Inner West: Land of runners!
activities.description: Amazing trails for bikes and runners, and thousands of people out there on a Saturday morning, even though the humidity was at Singapore levels. I did well to make it as far as I did. Temp 80, humidity 87

activities.name: Along the Wingecarribee with Marg and Tony
Furber Steps walk
activities.description: Tested negative for COVID this morning, so thought I’d go for a walk. Overdid it a little, but all’s well that ends well.

activities.name: First run after Covid… starting gently
activities.description: Tested positive until this morning. Very glad to be mostly done with it.

activities.name: Bean Walking
activities.description: And running on the tennis court

activities.name: Bean’s first run
activities.description: She thinks running is fun as long as you can stop to sniff every 50’ or so, and attempt to trip you up every now and then

activities.name: Reverse Dayton with Lauren
activities.description: Felt pretty good!

activities.name: Coffee with Herve
activities.description: And a mile or so pushing to keep up with his tranquillo pace

activities.name: Lungs not quite back to normal
activities.description: But good to get decent mileage this week

activities.name: Coal Creek and Cougar with Expect Delays
activities.description: Glorious morning

activities.name: Bean run
activities.description: Those little legs can move!

activities.name: Standard Tangle
activities.description: Felt tough… still building back

activities.name: Mini-bonk
activities.description: Recovered after mile 3

activities.name: Lots o’ stops
activities.description: Too long since breakfast. Good to soldier on though

activities.name: Little dogs head run
activities.description: Pushed it after the first 1/2 mile

activities.name: She pulls like a sled dog…
activities.description:
…. Until she smells something of interest 3” in front of your foot! The excitement of a Bean run.

Photo from the aftermath of our visit to the emergency vet on Tuesday night after she ate something toxic on a walk. Maybe marijuana.

activities.name: Seward Park and surrounds with a big crew
activities.description: Fun morning… and good coffee at Onda Origins Cafe in Columbia City to follow.

activities.name: Lake + comb
activities.description: Bit of a slog, but better towards the end.

activities.name: Not at all smooth, but longest run in a while
Green Lake and a bit more with Rick
activities.description: Great catch up, but forgot to turn on my watch.

activities.name: Stopping and starting and weaving and darting
activities.description: The joys of running with a small frisky dog

activities.name: Glorious morning on Squak
activities.description: Foggy below and sun peaking out at the top. Small group but a great run.
